name: G7 Critical Infrastructure Governance
rational: Validates reachability of government and financial infrastructure nodes for G7 nations. The G7 represents the majority of global financial transaction volume and democratic governance coordination. NMC status in any G7 node has systemic implications beyond national borders.
controls: Government portal reachability for all 7 G7 nations
Financial regulator and central bank reachability for all 7 G7 nations
Industrial anchor company web presence as proxy for B2B connectivity
Wildcard nodes explicitly excluded — precision scope only
standard: IOF-GOVERNANCE-v1 / G7 Digital Ministers commitment on critical infrastructure
requirements: REQ-IOF-G7-001: Government portal — all 7 nations reachable
REQ-IOF-G7-002: Financial regulator — all 7 nations reachable
REQ-IOF-G7-003: Industrial anchor — min 5 of 7 nations reachable

description.purpose: G7 government, finance and industrial reachability — no wildcards, precision scope
description.scope: G7 countries: US CA GB DE FR IT JP
